---
name: Enhancement tracking issue
about: Template for enhancement issues
labels: kind/enhancement
---

### Enhancement Description

- One-line enhancement description:
- Steering: <!-- link to website containing meeting minutes and summary of steering session, i.e., https://gardener.cloud/community/steering/... -->
- Gardener Enhancement Proposal: <!-- link to gardener/enhancements file; if none yet, link to PR -->
- Tracking Issue: <!-- link to issue in target repo(s) which track the individual PRs implementing this enhancement -->
- GEP (`g/enhancements`) update PR(s):

_Please keep this description up to date. This will help everybody to track the evolution of the enhancement efficiently._
